thought.text: I see - it uses SYsULexer.tokens from the source directory and converts it to C++ header. The lexer tokens are pre-defined. I need to copy the lexer grammar from task1 to task2 so the tokens match. Let me copy the lexer grammar:

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cp /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4 /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.g4", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Copy lexer grammar from task1 to task2"}

summary: Copy lexer grammar from task1 to task2
